recommendations.title: High-Priority Cross-Module Violations
recommendations.description: Found 2 HIGH severity violations appearing across multiple modules
recommendations.action: Review and apply proven fixes from other modules

recommendations.title: Company-Wide Coding Standards Review
recommendations.action: Consider updating coding guidelines or providing team training
